docs.title: Fastify Official Documentation
docs.description: Fast and low overhead web framework for Node.js. Docs are split into Guides (tutorial-style) and Reference (formal API docs). Covers getting started, plugins, hooks, validation, serialization, and TypeScript.

docs.title: Fastify Getting Started Guide
docs.description: Quick-start tutorial covering installation, first server, routing, plugins, and logging.

docs.title: Fastify Server API Reference
docs.description: Factory function and server instance API documentation — the core of Fastify.

docs.title: Fastify Routes Reference
docs.description: Complete route configuration, URL parameters, route constraints, and schema validation.

docs.title: Fastify Plugins Reference
docs.description: How to create, register, and encapsulate plugins — the foundation of Fastify's architecture.

docs.title: Fastify v5 Migration Guide
docs.description: Breaking changes and migration path from Fastify v4 to v5.
